title: Reporting fraud, abuse or misuse – Service Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Reporting fraud, abuse or misuse – Service Canada
Service Canada takes abuse of the programs it delivers very seriously. When an individual or a business receives benefits by providing false or misleading information, the quality of the programs we provide is at risk.
Help us prevent fraud to keep our programs safe by:
- telling us if you think someone has committed benefit fraud
- telling us if someone is using a false identity or a false social insurance number (SIN)
- protecting your personal information
- reporting abuse of workers or program misuse

## Contact information for fraud reporting

## Contact information for reporting abusive employers

### Temporary Foreign Worker Program
Canada takes the abuse of temporary foreign workers and the misuse of the Temporary Foreign Worker Program very seriously.
Learn about the different ways to report abuse .
You can also visit a Service Canada Centre to report fraud, misuse and abuse.
